description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a modern, open floor plan and a flat roof. The structure features a combination of white and gray exterior walls, large windows, and multiple entry points, including a prominent double garage door. The house includes several distinct rooms such as bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, a living area, and a dining space, all visible through the open layout. There is a small outdoor patio area with seating and greenery, suggesting a focus on indoor-outdoor living. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and the main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch and steps.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open floor plan, featuring a double garage and a patio area.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main living spaces, the patio with outdoor seating, and the double garage doors at the front.
description_view_1: This side view shows the length of the house, the arrangement of interior rooms, and the large windows along the facade.
description_view_2: This rear view emphasizes the garage, the back rooms, and the overall rectangular footprint of the house.
description_view_3: This view showcases the patio area, the main entryway with steps, and the distribution of windows along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and a modern door, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
